'''Durkii Squadron''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] stationed at the base on [[Kalist VI/Legends|Kalist VI]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]].

As of approximately eight months after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] the squadron was under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Jodeen]]. On the order of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Noils]], the garrison commander, the squadron was scrambled to drive off [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]], which was attacking the Imperial fuel tanker ''[[Nuna's Twins]]''.

The squadron was successful at repelling the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] attack, losing one [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]] to a collision with an Imperial [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|assault ship]] that had just arrived out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], and another to Rebel fire. Under attack from the squadron and the assault ship, and having completed their objectives, the Rebels then retreated. Jodeen was then ordered to have his squadron escort the fuel tanker to the base.

==Appearances==
*[[Empire 36|''Empire'' 36]] {{1st}}
